repomix.file_summary: This file is a merged representation of the entire codebase, combined into a single document by Repomix. The content has been processed where comments have been removed, empty lines have been removed, line numbers have been added, content has been formatted for parsing in xml style, content has been compressed (code blocks are separated by ⋮---- delimiter).This file contains a packed representation of the entire repository's contents. It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review, or other automated processes.The content is organized as follows: 1. This summary section 2. Repository information 3. Directory structure 4. Repository files (if enabled) 5. Repository files, each consisting of: - File path as an attribute - Full contents of the file- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the original repository files, not this packed version. - When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish between different files in the repository. - Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with the same level of security as you would the original repository.- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration - Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files - Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded - Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded - Code comments have been removed from supported file types - Empty lines have been removed from all files - Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line - Content has been formatted for parsing in xml style - Content has been compressed - code blocks are separated by ⋮---- delimiter - Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)
repomix.directory_structure: .gitignore .python-version app/__init__.py app/auth.py app/database.py app/main.py app/models/__init__.py app/models/customer.py app/models/inbound_message.py app/models/order.py app/models/salesperson.py app/models/unclear_item_alias.py app/routes/__init__.py app/routes/admin.py app/routes/dashboard.py app/routes/unclear_items_routes.py app/routes/webhook.py app/services/__init__.py app/services/adhoc_reporter.py app/services/customer_service.py app/services/message_journal.py app/services/notifier.py app/services/order_service.py app/services/pending_notifier.py app/services/pending_orders.py app/services/product_catalog.py app/services/reporter.py app/services/retry_scheduler.py app/services/template_parser.py app/services/webhook_health.py app/templates/dashboard.html check_db.py cleanup_db.py create_templates.ps1 migrate_phase4_inbound_messages.py migrate_phase4.py migrate_phase4.py.txt migrate_unclear_items.py Procfile pytest.ini render.yaml requirements.txt runtime.txt tests/conftest.py tests/README.md tests/test_customer_service.py tests/test_onboarding.py tests/test_order_flow.py tests/test_parser_unit.py tests/test_pending_orders.py tests/test_validate_name.py
